description: Composition denim shirt dress made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid sleeve button tab, buttoned centre placket, denim covered buttons, shirt back is slightly gathered at yolk, belt tie at back with belt loops at sides, two front pockets and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash with like colours, use only mild detergent Tumble dry low Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron The classic shirt dress has been reworked by arrow in denim fabric, and they've considered all the details - right down to cute covered buttons. Wear this as an easy casual dress when you want to look relaxed without losing out on style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
